channel.title: Latest World News from The Hindu Frontline | Frontline
channel.description: World News from Frontline. Brilliant, detailed and unbiased reporting on international affairs from the global south point of view.

image.title: Latest World News from The Hindu Frontline | Frontline

item.title: Upping the ante: What placing the Indus Waters Treaty in abeyance spells for India and Pakistan
item.description: By invoking “abeyance” instead of withdrawal, the Centre is testing the legal limits of the Treaty following the massacre in Pahalgam.

item.title: Trump’s tariff game leaves India holding the bill
item.description: India must act fast—forge new trade alliances, push for reforms, and boost manufacturing to avoid getting caught in the crossfire.

item.title: Amitav Ghosh on the age of monsters
item.description: In Wild Fictions, Ghosh links climate, capitalism, and migration, with side notes on vests, spice routes, and why tigers are not always good news.

channel.item: Trump has done incredible damage to global confidence in the US: Ashley J. TellisIt would take a liberal internationalist in the presidency for many terms before people begin to believe in the US again, says the strategic affairs expert.https://frontline.thehindu.com/world-affairs/us-china-tariff-war-ashley-tellis-us-india-relations-foreign-policy-interview/article69478005.ecearticle-69478005World AffairsTue, 22 Apr 2025 18:19:16 +0530<media:content height="675
